---
title: "Welcome"
---

::: {.hero-banner}
# Dr. Alex Rivera
### Geographer | GIS Specialist | Spatial Data Scientist
Exploring the intersection of climate change, urban planning, and spatial equity.
:::

## About Me

I am a quantitative geographer focused on developing open-source tools for spatial analysis. My work leverages satellite imagery and machine learning to understand urban heat islands and coastal erosion.

## Upcoming Events

::: {.event-card}
### [International Cartographic Conference 2026]{.text-secondary}
**Date:** March 15-20, 2026  
**Location:** Tokyo, Japan  
**Role:** Keynote Speaker on "The Future of Open Source GIS"
:::

::: {.event-card}
### [AGU Fall Meeting - Session on Remote Sensing]{.text-secondary}
**Date:** May 12, 2026  
**Location:** Virtual  
**Role:** Presenting "Automated Shoreline Detection using Sentinel-2"
:::

::: {.event-card}
### [Workshop: Spatial Data Science with Python]{.text-secondary}
**Date:** June 05, 2026  
**Location:** University of California, Berkeley  
**Role:** Instructor
:::

[View all past events →](presentations.qmd)
